title: Color Converter
seoDescription: Free online color converter. Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL color formats instantly with live preview. Perfect for designers and developers.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Color Converter
step1Desc: Use the color picker or type a color in HEX, RGB, or HSL format.
step2Desc: All three color formats update instantly as you change the color.
step3Desc: Click any format value to copy it to your clipboard for use in CSS or design tools.
faq2Q: Can I use the color picker?
faq2A: Yes, click the color preview square to open the native color picker.
faq3A: Yes, all conversions follow standard color space formulas.
